hero.narrative1: Yonyverse is a symbolic garden where dreams and projects can take root and grow.
hero.narrative2: Within this space, the Yony Games bring visions to life. They create a shared ground where cultures, ideas, and talents meet.
hero.narrative3: Through participation, individuals and communities gain visibility and inspire one another.
hero.narrative4: From the Egg springs the world Earth desires. We Are Born To Impact.

characters.title: The
characters.subtitle: Archetypal roles that shape the Yonyverse.

seeds.name: Yony Seeds
seeds.subtitle: Dream Carriers
seeds.description: Dream carriers presenting impact projects during the nine months of the Yony Games. Each Seed belongs to a Flower group of eight Seeds representing a territory.

brands.name: Yony Brands
brands.subtitle: Impactful Brands
brands.description: Visionary partners who align their brand identity with the cultural values of the Yony Games, amplifying the reach of dreams across the world.

lights.name: Yony Lights
lights.subtitle: Inspiring Influencers
lights.description: Creative luminaries who illuminate the cultural narratives of each territory through art, music, and storytelling.

angels.name: Yony Angels
angels.subtitle: Impact Mentors
angels.description: Generous guardians who provide resources and guidance to nurture the dreams of the Seeds throughout the journey.

stars.name: Yony Stars
stars.subtitle: Feminine Icons
stars.description: Renowned figures who lend their influence and wisdom to elevate the visibility and impact of the Yony Games.

magics.name: Yony Magics
magics.subtitle: Creative Alchemists
magics.description: Digital artists and technologists who weave immersive experiences, bringing the mythological universe to life.

guards.name: Yony Guards
guards.subtitle: Guardians of the Games
guards.description: Protectors of the values and integrity of the Yony Games, ensuring fairness, respect and cultural authenticity.

places.name: Yony Places
places.subtitle: Engaged Places
places.description: Sacred spaces and venues that host the physical manifestations of the Yony Games across the 16 founding territories.

games.title: The
games.subtitle: Eight games that elevate dreams, cultures and wisdom.

visibility.title: Visibility Games
visibility.description: These games help Yony Seeds share their vision, values, personality, and story with their community.

engagement.title: Engagement Games
engagement.description: Players explore the games, discover new perspectives, and earn Light Points to redistribute to Yony Flowers.

voices.title: Yony Voices
voices.description: Amplify cultural stories through voice and narrative, sharing wisdom across communities.

visions.title: Yony Visions
visions.description: Give visibility to your project through art — photography, illustration, music and beyond.

legends.title: Yony Legends
legends.description: Turn mystery into imagination. Uncover the legends hidden within each territory.

keys.title: Yony Keys
keys.description: Unlock cultural knowledge through collaborative riddles and ancient wisdom puzzles.

lightsGame.title: Yony Lights
lightsGame.description: Illuminate impact projects through creative storytelling and cultural celebration.

brandsGame.title: Yony Brands
brandsGame.description: Connect brands with cultural values, creating authentic partnerships that elevate dreams.

placesGame.title: Yony Places
placesGame.description: Discover sacred spaces and venues that host the physical games across territories.

travels.title: Yony Travels
travels.description: Discover the cultural traditions and connections that unite 16 inspiring countries.

worldMap.title: The Journey of the
worldMap.subtitle: 16 founding territories. 16 values. 16 cycles. 256 days.
worldMap.description: An Egg will be carried across the 16 territories activated during the Games. A central symbol of Yonyverse, it plays the role of the Olympic flame: a living sign of transformation, connection between peoples, and the rebirth of a new world founded on harmony.

benin.name: Benin
benin.desc: Lucidity reveals the truth that guides the journey.

gabon.name: Gabon
gabon.desc: Connection reminds us that every being is linked.

madagascar.name: Madagascar
madagascar.desc: Tolerance allows differences to coexist in harmony.

egypt.name: Egypt
egypt.desc: Gratitude honors the gifts received from the past.

turkey.name: Turkey
turkey.desc: Authenticity expresses the truth of one's being.

sweden.name: Sweden
sweden.desc: Cohesion unites individuals into a collective force.

mongolia.name: Mongolia
mongolia.desc: Humility opens the path to true understanding.

india.name: India
india.desc: Intuition listens to the silent voice within.

indonesia.name: Indonesia
indonesia.desc: Creativity transforms imagination into living culture.

japan.name: Japan
japan.desc: Perseverance shapes every step into mastery.

papuaNewGuinea.name: Papua New Guinea
papuaNewGuinea.desc: Resilience allows life to flourish despite adversity.

easterIsland.name: Easter Island
easterIsland.desc: Patience reminds us that great things take time.

mexico.name: Mexico
mexico.desc: Equity ensures that every voice has its place.

brazil.name: Brazil
brazil.desc: Empathy lets us feel the world through others.

peru.name: Peru
peru.desc: Benevolence spreads generosity through every action.

portal.title: The
portal.subtitle: Choose your path into the Yonyverse.

characters.title: Characters
characters.description: Meet the archetypal roles that shape the Yonyverse universe.

world.title: Explore the World
world.description: Journey through 16 founding territories and their cultural wisdom.

games.title: The Games
games.description: Discover the eight games that elevate dreams, cultures and wisdom.

join.title: Join the Games
join.description: Become part of the founding community and shape the future.

timeline.title: The
timeline.subtitle: 256 days. 16 cycles. One epic cultural odyssey.

join.title: The
join.subtitle: Before the games can begin, two steps must be completed. Once they are achieved, the official dates of the nine-month Yonyverse games will be announced.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Yony Family - Build the founding community
step1.desc1: The games need participants to embody the characters of the adventure.
step1.desc2: Each category of characters has a minimum number that must be reached.
step1.goal: 🎯 Goal: gather all the characters required for the game.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Yony Fund - Power the Collective Journey
step2.desc1: To bring the games to life across multiple territories, the essential foundations of the journey must be powered by collective support.
step2.desc2: The Yony Fund mobilizes collective financial and strategic support to help the adventure grow and reach the world.
step2.goal: 🎯 Goal: raise the resources needed to launch the collective journey.

exploration.title: Exploration and travel
exploration.desc: Transportation and explorations across the territories activated in the journey.

collective.title: Collective operations
collective.desc: Organization, coordination, and facilitation of the collective adventure.

story.title: Story and visibility
story.desc: Content creation and global visibility of the journey.

digital.title: Digital platform
digital.desc: Development and operation of the Yonyverse platform.

join.ctaSubtext: Be among the first — limited spots available for each character role.

experience.title: Experience the
experience.description: Yony Seeds, carriers of dreams and impact-driven projects, come together in groups of eight called Flowers, each connected to the delegation of a territory. Together, over nine months, they cultivate collaboration and the celebration of their values and their land. Explore the prototype.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel registration?
cancelDialog.description: Are you sure you want to cancel? All entered information will be lost.

roleSelection.title: Choose your
roleSelection.subtitle: Each role brings a unique contribution to the Yonyverse. Select the one that resonates most with you.
roleSelection.label: Your Role in the Yonyverse

yony_flowers_tutor.name: Yony Flowers (Tutor)
yony_flowers_tutor.description: Guide and mentor 8 Yony Seeds in their development journey

yony_flowers_project.name: Yony Flowers (Project Bearer)
yony_flowers_project.description: Bring an impact project to a specific country

yony_brands.name: Yony Brands
yony_brands.description: Create and develop the visual identity of the Yonyverse

yony_lights.name: Yony Lights
yony_lights.description: Illuminate and amplify the stories of the journey

yony_places.name: Yony Places
yony_places.description: Explore and connect the territories of the game

yony_guards.name: Yony Guards
yony_guards.description: Protect and maintain the harmony of the Yonyverse

personalInfo.title: Introduce yourself to the
personalInfo.subtitle: This information will help us create your profile in the Yonyverse.
personalInfo.emailNote: We will use this address to keep you informed about the Yonyverse
personalInfo.invalidImage: Please select a valid image file

specialization.title: Country
specialization.subtitle: Choose the country you want to be connected with in the Yonyverse.
specialization.countryNote: This country will be associated with your role in the Yonyverse ecosystem.
specialization.tutorDesc: As a Yony Flowers Tutor, you will be responsible for guiding and mentoring 8 Yony Seeds in their development journey. This is a significant commitment that requires dedication and passion for education and mentorship.
specialization.tutorAccept: I accept the mission to mentor 8 Yony Seeds
specialization.tutorAcceptNote: By checking this box, you commit to the responsibilities of a Tutor in the Yonyverse.
specialization.confirmed: Great! Your connection to {{country}} is confirmed.

engagementStep.title: Registration –
engagementStep.subtitle: As part of your registration, help us understand how you would like to contribute to the Yonyverse.
engagementStep.contributionTitle: How would you like to contribute?
engagementStep.interestsTitle: What areas interest you the most?
engagementStep.optionalDesc: Vision, experience, or ideas you'd like to bring to the Yonyverse.

confirmation.title: Confirm your
confirmation.subtitle: Review your information before submitting your application.
confirmation.name: Name:
confirmation.errorFields: Please fill in all required fields.
confirmation.successDesc: Your application has been submitted successfully.
confirmation.welcomeDesc: Your registration has been submitted successfully. The Yonyverse team will review your application and keep you informed about the next steps.
confirmation.nextStep1: Review of your application by the team
confirmation.nextStep3: Invitation to join the official community
confirmation.nextStep4: The beginning of your adventure in the Yonyverse

voices.title: Yony
voices.intro: A space where stories give life to projects.
voices.slide1: Every meaningful project begins with a story.
voices.slide1desc: Yony Voices invites Yony Seeds to share the personal moment, memory, or inspiration that gave birth to their vision.
voices.slide2desc: Tell your story through a short video, text, or audio.
voices.slide3desc: Post it and connect it to your project.
voices.slide4b: And each story helps a Flower bloom in the

visions.title: Yony
visions.intro: Give visibility to your project through art
visions.slide1desc: This challenge invites you to share the creations that express your vision.
visions.slide2desc: Each figure represents a source of inspiration.
visions.shareDesc: Post it and connect it to your project.
visions.finalDesc: And each vision brings a project into the light.

participantQuotes.amara: Through my lens, I capture the resilience of my community.
participantQuotes.carlos: Each melody carries the voice of the river.
participantQuotes.linh: My drawings weave together centuries of tradition.

legends.title: Yony
legends.slide1desc: A moment appears… but its origin remains unknown.
legends.slide2desc: And imagine what might happen next.
legends.slide3desc: Each figure represents a source of inspiration.
legends.shareDesc: Post it and connect it to your project.

keys.title: Yony
keys.intro: Find the values that open the path
keys.slide1desc: A dilemma appears… and a decision must be made.
keys.slide2: Choose two values to guide your
keys.slide2desc: These values become the keys that help you open a path.
keys.slide3desc: Each dilemma invites you to reflect and choose your guiding values.
keys.slide4desc: Select two values that resonate with your reflection.
keys.shareDesc: Post it and connect it to your project.

lights.title: Yony
lights.intro: Discover the creators who illuminate the world
lights.slide1: Explore creators whose culture, traditions, and causes
lights.slide1desc: Each one carries a light worth discovering.
lights.slide2desc: From this story, guess which creator it describes.
lights.slide3desc: You may reveal clues to help you.
lights.slide4: Each correct answer adds a new
lights.slide4sub: Build your personal constellation of inspiring creators.
lights.paraboleExample: "Là où les montagnes semblent impossibles à cultiver, elle révèle des escaliers de terre que des mains anciennes ont sculptés…"

brands.title: Yony
brands.intro: Explore, learn, play, and support brands creating social, cultural, and ecological impact.
brands.explorerDesc: Learn about an impact brand through its story, mission, values, and actions.
brands.matchDesc: Match each image with the correct impact brand.
brands.regionDesc: Filter brands by continent or country.
brands.redistributeDesc: Redistribute your tokens to the Flowers of the Yonyverse and support their projects.

places.title: Yony
places.introDesc: An immersive urban experience that transforms meaningful places into points of a global cultural movement.
places.goToDesc: Find a Yony Places partner location in one of the participating cities around the world.
places.scanDesc: Each location hosts a unique QR code linking to a cultural object.
places.discoverDesc: Learn about its origins, its journey, and its meaning for the community it comes from.
places.giftDesc: After each scan, enter the location lottery. Leave a Google review and receive your reward.
places.redistributeDesc1: Earn Light Tokens after each scan.
places.redistributeDesc2: Redistribute your tokens to the Flowers of the Yonyverse and support their projects.

travels.title: Yony
travels.slide1desc2: Follow journeys across the world and discover traditions, places, and stories.
travels.exploreDesc: Each territory invites you to discover its traditions, places, and cultural mysteries.
travels.followDesc: Each destination reveals cultural clues and hidden knowledge.
travels.solveDesc: Unlock the secrets of each territory by solving cultural riddles and challenges.
travels.collectDesc1: Each solved riddle rewards you with Light Tokens.
travels.collectDesc2: Build your collection as you travel through the Yonyverse.
travels.redistributeDesc: Redistribute your tokens to the Flowers of the Yonyverse and support their projects.

seo.homeTitle: Yonyverse — A Global Cultural Gaming Universe
seo.homeDescription: Enter Yonyverse, a global universe where dreams, cultures and wisdom come together through the Yony Games.
seo.joinTitle: Join the Yonyverse — Choose Your Character
seo.joinDescription: Become part of the Yonyverse founding community. Choose your character role and shape the future of cultural gaming.
